scripts.verify:phase0: pnpm turbo build && pnpm turbo test && pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo lint && echo 'Phase 0 verification passed'
scripts.seed:medusa: cd apps/medusa && pnpm seed || echo 'run bootstrap first'
scripts.verify:local: echo '=== Seed validate ===' && npx tsx scripts/seed.ts --validate && echo '=== Typecheck ===' && pnpm --filter mobile typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck && echo '=== Basic flow sim (node via tsx) ===' && npx tsx -e 'console.log("Sim: seed+mock rules + earnings/credits"); const {getSeedData} = require("./scripts/seed"); const s=getSeedData(); console.log("Seeds OK:", s.cooks.length, s.dishes.length); const {calculateCookEarnings} = require("@shc/business-rules"); console.log("Earnings 10000c @15%:", calculateCookEarnings(10000)); console.log("Local verify complete.")' && echo '=== verify:local PASSED ==='
scripts.dev:full: echo 'Start with: pnpm docker:up (opt) && pnpm turbo dev --filter=medusa & pnpm --filter=mobile dev & pnpm --filter=web dev (port 3001). Use EXPO_PUBLIC_ or web env for real Medusa toggle. Side-by-side customer flows.'
scripts.medusa:seed:validate: cd apps/medusa && npx tsx scripts/seed.ts || true
scripts.start:full: echo 'See LOCAL_TESTING.md and the instructions below. Run in separate terminals.'
